steps.title: Fit the table first
steps.content: Enter the table points $(1,11)$ and $(2,16)$ into Desmos and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. This is faster than testing every answer choice from scratch.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: The regression gives $m=5$ and $b=6$, so the equation is $y=5x+6$. It checks in the table: $5(1)+6=11$ and $5(2)+6=16$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is $y=5x+6$, so A is correct.
